# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-http
  namespace: app
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-allow-ingress
  namespace: app
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ingress
          namespace: linkerd-viz

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-http
  namespace: app
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-allow-frontend
  namespace: app
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: app

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-tcp
  namespace: app
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
  port: 5432
  proxyProtocol: opaque

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: database-allow-backend
  namespace: app
spec:
  server:
    name: database-tcp
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: backend
          namespace: app

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payments-grpc
  namespace: app
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments
  port: 9090
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payments-allow-backend
  namespace: app
spec:
  server:
    name: payments-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: backend
          namespace: app

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notifications-http
  namespace: app
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notifications
  port: 8081
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: notifications-allow-backend
  namespace: app
spec:
  server:
    name: notifications-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: backend
          namespace: app

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: metrics-admin
  namespace: app
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  port: 9091
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: metrics-admin-allow-prometheus
  namespace: app
spec:
  server:
    name: metrics-admin
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: linkerd-viz

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: cache-tcp
  namespace: app
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: cache
  port: 6379
  proxyProtocol: opaque

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: cache-allow-backend
  namespace: app
spec:
  server:
    name: cache-tcp
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: backend
          namespace: app
        - name: payments
          namespace: app
